remember: Recall and state the laws of thermodynamics
List and define the different types of processes
Mention the significance of thermodynamic systems and surroundings
understand: Explain the concept of internal energy and its relation to heat and work
Describe the first law of thermodynamics and its applications
Understand the concept of entropy and its role in thermodynamic processes
apply: Apply the first law of thermodynamics to solve problems involving heat, work, and internal energy
Use the second law of thermodynamics to determine the efficiency of heat engines
Apply the concept of entropy to predict the spontaneity of thermodynamic processes
analyze: Compare and contrast different types of heat engines and their efficiencies
Analyze the effect of temperature on the internal energy of a system
Evaluate the role of thermodynamics in real-world applications such as refrigeration and air conditioning

ncert_objectives: State the zeroth law of thermodynamics and explain its significance.
Define internal energy and explain its change in a thermodynamic process.
Describe the first law of thermodynamics and its applications.
board_exam_objectives: First law of thermodynamics and its applications
Second law of thermodynamics and its applications
Thermodynamic processes, such as isothermal, adiabatic, and cyclic processes
